sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check the current position of the cross and see if I should keep moving it left toward the yellow gap at cols 38-39.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current cross position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('c', 'Y') and n['pixels'] >= 12:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} bbox=({min(rows)},{min(cols)},{max(rows)},{max(cols)})")

# The yellow gap in the black bar is at cols 38-39
# Cross is now at cols 42-45 (moved left 4 from 46-49)
# Need to move left once more to align with gap at 38-39
# Cross at 38-41 would overlap with gap at 38-39
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
